headline: Is It Time To Reassess Baxter International (BAX) After A 35.9% One Year Share Price Slide
summary: For investors weighing whether Baxter International's current share price offers value or simply more volatility after a tough few years, this breakdown focuses squarely on what the numbers indicate about the stock. The share price recently closed at US$17.60, with returns of 2.1% over 7 days and 3.0% over 30 days. Year to date the stock shows a 9.7% decline and the 1-year return is 35.9% in the red. Recent coverage has highlighted Baxter International as a long-established medical products...
